_comment: This message indicates that the comments are generated by AI.
style.label: <color:#FFF200>
style.name: <white>
help.afk.description: Toggle your AFK status. Broadcasts to the server.
help.afk.args: [message...] Optional reason shown to other players.
help.afklist.description: List all AFK players and how long they have been AFK.
help.afklist.args: [sort] Sorting method: time, duration, world, or name.
help.ah.description: Auction House — Browse items, sell, and manage your listings.
help.ah.subcommands:
sell <price> List the item in your hand for sale.
cancel [id] Cancel one of your listings.
listings View your current listings.
expired View your expired listings.
help.ah.args: <price> Must be a positive number.\n[id] Transaction ID. If not provided, choose from your listings.
help.back.description: Return to where you were before teleporting or dying.
help.balance.description: Check your own or another player's balance.
help.balance.args: [player] Online player. Requires essentialsc.balance.others for other accounts.
help.baltop.description: Display the wealthiest players on the server.
help.ban.description: Ban a player from the server permanently or temporarily.
help.ban.args: <player> Target player's name.\n-t:<duration> Optional, e.g., -t:1h or -t:7d. Leave empty for permanent.\n[reason...] Shown to the banned player and in server announcements.
help.banip.description: Ban an IP address. Use a player's name or a direct IP address.
help.banip.args: <player|IP> Player name or IPv4/IPv6 address.\n-t:<duration> Optional argument for the time duration.\n[reason...] Reason for the ban.
help.banlist.description: View active bans, filtered by type.
help.banlist.subcommands: players Display player bans.\nips Display IP bans.\nhistory Display the history of recent bans.
help.broadcast.description: Send a message to the entire server. The first word can be a world.
help.broadcast.args: [world] Optional, to send only to a specific world.\n<message...> Supports MiniMessage formatting.
help.broadcast.examples: /broadcast Server restarting in 5 minutes!\n/broadcast world_nether The Nether will be reset tonight.
help.checkpunish.description: Check for any active bans or mutes on a specific player.
help.checkpunish.args: <player> Player's name. Works for offline players too.
help.clearinventory.description: Clear your own or another player's inventory.
help.clearinventory.args: [player] Target player. Requires essentialsc.clearinventory.others for others.
help.dback.description: Return to your last location of death.
help.delhome.description: Delete one of your saved homes by name.
help.delhome.args: <name> Name of the home you wish to delete.
help.delwarp.description: Remove a warp point from the server.
help.delwarp.args: <name> Name of the warp to delete.
help.eco.description: Manage the economy: give, take, set, or reset balances.
help.eco.subcommands:
give Add money to a player's balance.
take Deduct money from a player's balance.
set Set a player's balance to a specific amount.
reset Reset a player's balance to the default value.
help.eco.args: <player|@everyone> Target player or all online players.\n<amount> Must be a positive number.
help.enchant.description: Enchant the item in your hand.
help.enchant.args: <enchantment> Name of the enchantment.\n[level] Enchantment level. Defaults to maximum if omitted.
help.enderchest.description: Open your own or another player's ender chest.
help.endersee.description: Look inside another player's ender chest.
help.endersee.args: <player> Online player. Cannot be used on yourself.
help.essc.description: EssentialsC management: reload, backup, version, debug, and placeholders.
help.essc.subcommands:
reload Reload all config and language files.
backup Manage database backups.
version Show current plugin version.
debug Toggle debug logging.
placeholders Show all registered PAPI placeholders.
help.feed.description: Satiate your own or another player's hunger.
help.god.description: Toggle god mode for yourself or another player.
help.hat.description: Wear the item in your hand as a hat.
help.heal.description: Fully heal yourself or another player.
help.home.description: Teleport to one of your saved homes or view the list.
help.home.args: [name] Name of the home. Displays list if omitted.\n<player> <name> Teleport to another player's home. Requires essentialsc.home.admin.
help.homes.description: List all your homes with their coordinates.
help.homes.args: [player] Optional for offline players. Requires admin permission.
help.ignore.description: Ignore a player or view your ignore list.
help.ignore.args: [player] Player to ignore or un-ignore. Leave empty to view list.
help.invsee.description: View and modify another player's inventory.
help.invsee.args: <player> Player name. For offline players: essentialsc.invsee.offline.
help.itemid.description: View info on the held item: material, durability, enchantments, and NBT.
help.kick.description: Kick a player from the server.
help.kick.args: <player> Target online player.\n[reason...] Displayed on the kick screen.
help.kit.description: Claim a kit. Kits have cooldowns and permissions.
help.kit.subcommands: claim <name> Claim the specified kit.\ncooldown <name> View the remaining time until next claim.\ndebug <name> Show technical info about the kit.
help.kit.args: [name] Name of the kit. Leave empty to see available kits.
help.kits.description: View all kits and manage the kit system.
help.kits.subcommands: list List all kits.\nreload Reload the kits.yml file.
help.msg.description: Send a private message to an online player.
help.msg.args: <player> Recipient player.\n<message...> The content of the message.
help.msg.examples: /msg Steve hey\n/msg Alex meet me at spawn
help.mute.description: Mute a player in chat. Duration can be specified.
help.mute.args: <player> Target player.\n-t:<duration> e.g., -t:30m or -t:1h. Leave empty for permanent.\n[reason...] Reason for the mute.
help.nick.description: Change your display name. Supports MiniMessage.
help.nick.args: <name> New nickname.\noff Removes nickname.\n<player> Set another player's nickname. Requires essentialsc.nick.others.
help.pay.description: Transfer money from your balance to another player.
help.ping.description: View your own or another player's connection ping.
help.playerlist.description: View the list of online players and total count.
help.playtime.description: View your own or another player's total play time.
help.ptime.args: <setting> day, noon, night, midnight, dawn, dusk.\n<ticks> 0 to 24000. Add 'locked' to freeze time.\nreset Revert to server time.
help.pweather.args:
sun Sunny.
rain Rain.
storm Thunderstorm.
reset Revert to server weather.
help.quicksell.description: Sell your held item or full inventory at shop prices.
help.quicksell.args: [inventory] Sell the entire inventory. Requires essentialsc.quicksell.inventory.
help.realname.description: Find the real name of a player using a nickname.
help.rename.description: Rename the item in your hand.
help.rename.args: <name...> New name. MiniMessage supported. Length limits apply.
help.repair.description: Repair the item in your hand, or for another player.
help.reply.description: Reply to the person who last sent you a private message.
help.rtp.description: Randomly teleport to a safe location in the world.
help.scoreboard.subcommands: toggle Show or hide the scoreboard.\nreload Reload the scoreboard configuration.
help.seen.description: Check when a player was last online, first join, and play time.
help.seen.args: <player> Player's name. Works for offline players too.
help.sell.description: Open the sell GUI to sell items.
help.setspawn.description: Set the server spawn to your current location.
help.sethome.description: Save your current location as a home.
help.sethome.args: [name] Name of the home. Default: 'home'. Alphanumeric & underscores only.
help.setwarp.description: Create a new warp point at your location.
help.setwarp.args: <name> Name of the warp. Must be alphanumeric.
help.shop.description: Open the server shop or jump directly to a category.
help.shop.args: [category] The category to open directly.\nreload Reload shop configs (admin).
help.spawn.description: Teleport to the server spawn. Admins can send others.
help.spawn.args: [player] Target player for spawn teleport. Requires essentialsc.spawn.admin.
help.spawnentity.description: Spawn an entity at your location.
help.spawnentity.args: <entity> Type of entity (e.g., zombie, cow).\n[amount] Quantity to spawn. Limits apply.
help.speed.description: Change your walking or flying speed, or reset it.
help.speed.subcommands: walkspeed Set walking speed (0.0–1.0).\nflyspeed Set flying speed (0.0–1.0).\nreset Revert all speeds to default.
help.sudo.description: Force another player to run a command or chat message.
help.sudo.args: <player> Target online player.\n<command|message...> The command (starting with /) or text.
help.top.description: Teleport to the highest block directly above you.
help.tpa.description: Send a request to teleport to another player.
help.tpa.args: <player> Player you wish to teleport to.
help.tpahere.description: Request another player to teleport to you.
help.tpahere.args: <player> Player you wish to bring to your location.
help.tpaccept.args: [player] Accept request from a specific player. Defaults to latest.
help.tpadeny.args: [player] Decline request from a specific player. Defaults to latest.
help.tpacancel.description: Cancel a teleport request you have sent.
help.tpaqueue.description: View all your pending TPA requests (incoming & outgoing).
help.tpaignore.description: Block a specific player from sending TPA requests.
help.tphere.description: Teleport a player to your location instantly.
help.tphereall.description: Teleport all online players to your location instantly.
help.tpoffline.description: Teleport to an offline player's last location.
help.unban.description: Lift the ban for a banned player.
help.unenchant.description: Remove enchantments from the item in your hand.
help.unenchant.args: [enchantment] Name of the enchantment.\nall Remove all enchantments.
help.unmute.description: Lift the mute for a muted player.
help.unmute.args: <player> Name of the muted player (must be online).
help.uptime.description: View how long the server has been running.
help.warp.description: Teleport to a server warp. Displays list if omitted.
help.warp.args: [name] Target warp. Costs and warm-up times may apply.
help.warp.permission:
essentialsc.warp
bypass warmup: essentialsc.warp.bypass.warmup
bypass cooldown: essentialsc.warp.bypass.cooldown
free: essentialsc.warp.free
help.warps.description: View all warps available to you.
help.warpadmin.description: Manage server warps: permissions, costs, visibility, and more.
help.warpadmin.subcommands:
setperm Set or clear required permission.
setcost Set usage cost.
setdesc Set warp description.
setcategory Assign a warp to a category.
hide Hide from warp list.
unhide Make hidden warp visible.
move Move to current location.
info Show full details.
reload Reload warp config.
help.worth.description: Show the shop sell value of your held item, or full inventory.
help.worth.args: [inventory] Total value of all inventory items. Requires essentialsc.worth.inventory.
help.anvil.description: Open a virtual anvil GUI from anywhere.
help.craftingtable.description: Open a virtual crafting table from anywhere.
